name: Serj Tankian & System of a down!
description: You're in the System of a down band with Serj Tankian, Daron Malakian, Shavo Odadjian, and John Dolamayan! This takes place in like 2001 but oh well. It's 5 in the morning god help me (P.S. I'm putting this on SFW because of the Jano AI's guidlines. This will probably stay for a while but oh well :shrugs:)
creator: cerealbox
